info.title: Empx Cross-chain VPS API
info.description: OpenAPI definition for non-partner VPS HTTP endpoints exposed by StatusAPI and AdminAPI. Public StatusAPI endpoints are documented under /api/v1. Endpoints under /partner are intentionally excluded.

tags.name: Public
tags.description: Unauthenticated quote, intent, and health endpoints

post.description: Updates refund case fields for an intent. Requires x-admin-key header.

get.description: Returns aggregated status for a primary transfer intent paired with a Gas.zip destination gas intent.

post.description: Cancels a quote-stage intent or records wallet-level cancellation for submitted intents.

409.description: Refund review not allowed for current intent status

post.description: Requires a signed wallet message and source transaction hash.

get.summary: List LayerZero Value Transfer API chains

post.summary: Build LayerZero Value Transfer API user steps

409.description: Intent is not eligible for this LayerZero Value Transfer API action

post.summary: Submit LayerZero Value Transfer API signature

409.description: Intent is not eligible for this LayerZero Value Transfer API action

post.summary: Mark LayerZero Value Transfer API intent as submitted

409.description: Intent is not eligible for this LayerZero Value Transfer API action

get.summary: List LayerZero Value Transfer API tokens

post.description: Returns an offer set and optionally a legacy top-level quote snapshot.

400.description: Invalid request or no available route

post.description: Selects one offer from an offer set and returns intentId, quote, and executable integration payload.

409.description: Selected offer unavailable with fallback candidates

post.summary: Select composed primary transfer and Gas.zip destination gas offers
post.description: Creates two quoted intents from one offer set: one for the primary transfer and one for Gas.zip destination gas.

200.description: Composed offer selected and integrations prepared

404.description: One or more selected offers are unavailable or expired

Address.description: Address-like token/user field accepted by the VPS.

BigIntString.description: Unsigned integer encoded as a base-10 string.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds used in signed payload.
